title: Brownfield Access Review Estimate Set
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-task-list.md` and `./access-review-modernization-risk-register.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the estimate set for this slice. Use one consistent estimation unit, size the tasks individually, make uncertainty explicit, and reflect coordination or brownfield risk where it changes the estimate.

assertions.name: uses-consistent-estimation-unit
assertions.description: The estimate set uses one coherent unit instead of mixing incompatible sizing styles.

assertions.name: estimates-task-by-task
assertions.description: Each planned task receives an explicit size rather than being left implicit.

assertions.name: uncertainty-and-assumptions-explicit
assertions.description: Assumptions, blockers, dependencies, or confidence are recorded clearly.

assertions.name: risk-changes-the-estimate
assertions.description: Brownfield and coordination risk widen or qualify estimates where appropriate.

assertions.name: prepares-downstream-planning
assertions.description: The output is shaped so sprint-planning can consume it directly.
